title: Vitest setup configuration for DOM testing and component mocking
purpose: Configures the testing environment for Vitest by adding jest-dom matchers, setting up cleanup utilities, and mocking components that would otherwise cause test failures.
module_context: Imports jest-dom matchers and configures global mocks for ResizeObserver and EmbeddedTerminal component.

steps.content: Import jest-dom matchers to extend DOM testing capabilities.
Mock the ResizeObserver API to prevent DOM-related test errors.
Replace the EmbeddedTerminal component with a mock version for testing.
Configure the mock terminal to render with test identifiers and class names.
